notes: Elite air-superiority specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, the pure air-combat counterpart to Windy Peaks' scouting/ground-support focus. Iron Aviary builds Wingfighter (anti-troop dogfighter) and Thunder (heavier, missile-armed) — Cargocopter is Cloudreach's Covert Airfield unlock, not Iron Aviary's. Sited on Plains, no terrain exception. No specialty defense building or Barracks — relies on generic Turret/Missile Launcher plus Walls only. Generated with a ring of water terrain (a moat) surrounding the base, making it harder to approach with Land-domain troops (and unreachable by Naval, being landlocked) — Air units ignore it entirely, same as every other terrain restriction.
